phrases.intent_en: Ask where the dining area is
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿dónde está la zona para comer?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, DON-deh es-TAH la SOH-nah pah-rah koh-MER?

likely_response.local: Al fondo, a la derecha del mostrador.
likely_response.pronunciation: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah DEHL moh-strah-DOHR
likely_response.translation_en: At the back, to the right of the counter.

responses.english: At the back, to the right of the counter.
responses.phonetic: AHL FOHN-doh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah DEHL moh-strah-DOHR
responses.french: Al fondo, a la derecha del mostrador.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if a table is free
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿tienen una mesa libre ahora?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, TYEH-nen oo-nah MEH-sah LEE-breh ah-OH-rah?

likely_response.local: Sí, hay mesas libres al fondo.
likely_response.pronunciation: SÍ AHY MEH-sahs LEEB-rehs AHL FOHN-doh
likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there are free tables at the back.

responses.english: Yes, there are free tables at the back.
responses.phonetic: SÍ AHY MEH-sahs LEEB-rehs AHL FOHN-doh
responses.french: Sí, hay mesas libres al fondo.

phrases.intent_en: Ask what today's tapas specials are
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿cuáles son las tapas especiales de hoy?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nohs DEE-ahs, KWAH-les sohn lahs TAH-pahs eh-speh-SYAH-les deh oy

likely_response.translation_en: It is indicated on the chalkboard.

responses.english: It is indicated on the chalkboard.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which local wine to try
phrases.text_local: Buenos días, ¿qué vino local me recomienda probar?
phrases.pronunciation: BWEH-nos DEE-as, ¿keh BEE-no lo-KAL meh reh-ko-MYEN-da pro-BAR?

likely_response.local: Pruebe el Cariñena tinto de nuestra bodega.
likely_response.pronunciation: proo-EH-beh EHL kah-ree-NYEH-nah TEEN-toh DEH noo-EH-strah boh-DEH-gah
likely_response.translation_en: Try a Somontano red, it is on the second page.

responses.english: Try a Somontano red, it is on the second page.
responses.phonetic: proo-EH-beh EHL kah-ree-NYEH-nah TEEN-toh DEH noo-EH-strah boh-DEH-gah
responses.french: Pruebe el Cariñena tinto de nuestra bodega.
